generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderAxis1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensorIM : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderAxis1
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderAxis1
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorIM
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current I_M measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from current and position data using manufacturer dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASAssetDescription : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based systems engineering modeling enabler for structural representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink-based simulation enabler for multi-physics friction modeling and motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionControlService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell enabler for asset metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASMetadataService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabler for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool enabler for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for structural modeling of the robot axis using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParameterInsight, FrictionModelDeviationInsight
]

instance AASMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing asset metadata via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for streaming sensor data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of simulated versus measured data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model integration for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAction
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model representation for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance FrictionModelParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameter identification from simulated and measured data deviations"
]

instance FrictionModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulated and measured data for friction model accuracy"
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset metadata description for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming from physical sensors to virtual twin"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data"
]

instance MotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of motion control parameters based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains MotorEncoderAxis1, GearboxEncoderAxis1, CurrentSensorIM, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionData, GearboxEncoderPositionData, CurrentData, TorqueData, AngularVelocityData, AccelerationData, SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AASAssetDescription, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, StructuralModelingService, FrictionModelIdentificationService, AASMetadataService, DataStreamingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, MotionControlService, StructuralModelInsight, FrictionModelParameterInsight, FrictionModelDeviationInsight, AssetMetadataInsight, DataStreamingInsight, VisualizationInsight, MotionControlAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing, with live measurements from sensors continuously integrated into the digital shadow for immediate model refinement and visualization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, AAS metadata, MQTT-streamed sensor data, processing components for model execution, and dashboard visualization, forming a purpose-driven reference model (DSRM) with traceable data origins."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data during robot motion control for continuous friction model refinement and accuracy improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data traces, traceability of data generation via Processing components, and multi-physics-aware modeling combining white-box and black-box approaches for friction identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling; no specific standard numbers or industry frameworks mentioned."
]
